description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular grassy plot, featuring a dark, overhanging roof with a slight asymmetry and a central entrance accessed by a straight walkway. The front facade includes a recessed entryway flanked by two large windows, and the structure is surrounded by three prominent signboards, two of which display images and one that appears blank. The exterior walls are a muted gray, contrasting with the darker roof and trim, and the windows are large, likely allowing ample natural light inside. The side and rear views reveal minimal fenestration, with only a single small window on one side and a pair of large windows at the back. The building sits on a flat, open lawn, suggesting a suburban or urban infill context. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark, overhanging roof, large front windows, and a central entrance, set on a grassy plot with three signboards. The design is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central entrance, two large front windows, a walkway, and three signboards, two with images and one blank.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the roof's overhang, the walkway leading to the entrance, and the alignment of the three signboards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two large windows and the open grassy area, with the signboards visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single small window, the walkway, and the backs of the signboards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front windows with large rear windows
